headline: Hiru News wins Most Popular News Programme of the Year
standfirst: Hiru News is recognised in the Global Business Excellence Awards previous winners archive for Most Popular News Programme of the Year, with source-backed context prepared for readers reviewing the award record.

content.text: Hiru News and the award record

Hiru News is recorded by the Global Business Excellence Awards as the winner of Most Popular News Programme of the Year. This article gives the award record context for readers who are searching for Hiru News, the exact award title, and the verified sources currently available for this winner profile.

Hiru News operates official Sinhala and English news websites. The GBE archive records Hiru News as Most Popular News Programme of the Year. The profile is intentionally written as an award record rather than an unsupported marketing biography, so claims about scale, leadership, service quality, or market position are limited to what the cited sources can support.
Why the Most Popular News Programme of the Year record matters

The Most Popular News Programme of the Year recognition places Hiru News in the GBE previous winners archive for 2025. For a prospective customer, partner, journalist, or award researcher, the practical value of this page is a clean public record: who received the award, what the award was called, and which source trail was reviewed before publication.
Award title: Most Popular News Programme of the Year.
Recipient profile reviewed against available source notes.

Source notes reviewed for this page include gbeaward.com, hirunews.lk, hirunews.lk. These references are used to confirm identity, business activity, programme identity, or award context. Where a source is a social profile, directory listing, booking platform, or press article rather than a recipient-owned website, the article keeps the claim narrow and avoids treating that source as proof of wider performance.
For the Most Popular News Programme of the Year page, that source trail anchors the story to the exact award record instead of a broad promotional profile.

Avoid unsupported audience or ranking claims beyond the award title. This limitation matters because the site should not turn a winner listing into inflated SEO copy. It should help people discover the award record while keeping every visible claim defensible.
The Most Popular News Programme of the Year page therefore stays careful, useful, and defensible for readers checking the public record.

Hiru News's winner page will continue to be updated when stronger official sources, rights-cleared media, recipient statements, or ceremony materials are available. Until then, this page prioritises clarity, the official award wording, and source-backed context over generic promotional language.
Future updates to the Most Popular News Programme of the Year page can add deeper recipient context when stronger evidence is available.
